toolchain.note: Recorded so a future failure can be attributed. The host HBDK and the board HBRT must match; 3.7.0 host pairs with 4.0.5 board.

measured.note: Measured on S100P with the SHIPPED crop build, not the rebuild below. Latency is from hrt_model_exec perf on a quiet board -- a board with a crashed process leaking VPU/BPU resources reports substantially worse until reboot.

node_info.output_data_type: si16 on 642 nodes, si8 on 16 -- confirms set_all_nodes_int16
node_info.caution: Per-layer cosine is a localisation tool, not a gate: two thirds of layers sit below 0.99 while the model output is 0.999954.

rejected_builds.name: int8 (all)
rejected_builds.why: Fast, and wrong: ~1px systematic disparity offset plus speckle. soft-argmax accumulates softmax quantisation error rather than cancelling it.

rejected_builds.name: mixed precision (cost volume + head int16)
rejected_builds.why: The counter-intuitive one. Scattered int8/int16 boundaries make requant dominate: 6x SLOWER than quantising everything to int16, for worse accuracy.

rebuild.note: This repo's recipe re-run on OE 3.7.0. It is NOT the shipped binary and cannot be: the shipped crop build calibrated on 15 stereo pairs from an uncommitted capture set, while the upstream repo ships only 5.

layer_C_hbm_vs_onnx.note: max error is in occlusion/border pixels; the disparity field is otherwise sub-pixel

board_verification.note: First full three-layer close-out in this repo. Uses the rebuild (5-pair calibration), not the shipped binary.
